title: Where, who, what
excerpt:
“(where)” –  Lluís Ribes i Portillo (cc) “(who)” –  Lluís Ribes i Portillo (cc) “(what)” –  Lluís Ribes i Portillo (cc)  “I’ll slip away” And I’ll forget about the girl that said no  Then I’ll tell who I want where to go  And I’ll forget about your lies and deceit  And your attempts to be so discreet  Maybe … 
Llegir més…
